title: Davies, Gareth - Exchequer Secretary to the Treasury - ACOBA advice
body: "Senior Fellow of the Mossavar-Rahmani Center for Business and Government, Harvard Kennedy School  Mr Davies sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Harvard Kennedy School. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
